title: Claude Fable 5 joins the text endpoint
summary:
A heavy-hitting new Claude model drops into the text API, and a new community learning app joins the showcase.

Anthropic's new Mythos-class model, Claude Fable 5, is now wired up via AWS Bedrock. It brings a massive 1M token context window, vision capabilities, and tool support directly to the standard text generation API.

The apps directory grows by one with the addition of Wikimind, a community-built learning tool that integrates translation for interactive messaging.
